# Chapter 6: Stochastic systems and Kalman filtering  (~120 pp)
- 6.1 Random processes (12) · 6.2 Linear Gaussian systems (15) · 6.3 Kalman filter derivation engineering-first (20) · 6.4 Extended and unscented Kalman filter (18) · 6.5 Particle filters (15) · 6.6 Sensor fusion (15) · 6.7 Failure section: filter divergence, mismatched noise covariance, the GPS-jamming problem (25)

**Archetype**: uncertainty, transport. **Project**: implement a 2D tracker with Kalman filter on real video data. **Exercises**: 35.
